checkin.journal:
My shoulder is a little bit numb, my sitting bones are quite painful, and I didn't sleep that well. Hence my Cosita being snoring a lot and moving. It was a really interesting day because of the museum and because of the nice walk in Zürich. I also met Thomas the guy from the bank.
Blog taking is somewhere 4 out of 10. Could be worse, could be better. Considering I ate a lot of stuff today, different kinds of things. A little bit, I think it's still fine.
